A New Age of Collecting Has Set Sail

OPCARDX

Every collection is a voyage.

Chart every card, vault your treasure, know its worth, and battle for glory. OPCARDX is the first all-in-one home for One Piece TCG collectors — and the Grand Line is calling.

JOIN THE CREW CHART THE VISION
BELOW DECK▼
The Captain's Log

Why We Set Sail

Collecting One Piece cards should feel like the adventure the cards are about. Instead, collectors are stuck with spreadsheets, group chats, and guesswork. OPCARDX is the ship we wished we had — where every card is charted, every collection is a vault worth showing, every card's true bounty is known, and every duel becomes a story. We're not building a database. We're building the Grand Line.

I.

Chart Every Card

Scan any card and log it in seconds. Your whole collection, mapped from East Blue to the New World.

II.

The Vault

Your collection as treasure, not a list. Build showcase decks worth showing off — sealed, appraised, and yours.

III.

The Price Oracle

Every card's real bounty — set by the market and the community. No more guesswork, no more bad trades.

IV.

Battle Mode

Bring your deck to life. Duel other captains, climb the ranks, and earn your name among the greats.

The Crew

The Crew Behind the Compass

Every great crew is built from people who have already made their name. Ours collect, compete, and live this world — and carry its flag.

WANTED
— THE CAPTAIN —
The Captain
Ricky
NOTORIETY
฿ 3,400,000,000

Serial startup founder and UC Berkeley Haas graduate. Ex–bulge-bracket finance, now a builder at the frontier of tech and AI. He charts OPCARDX's course.

— THE CONNOISSEUR —
The Connoisseur
Ricky
NOTORIETY
฿ 3,100,000,000

One of the world's top-ranked One Piece TCG collectors — and a world-renowned concert pianist. He knows treasure when he sees it, and has chased every grail on the Grand Line.

WANTED
— THE CHAMPION —
The Champion
Guanrong
NOTORIETY
฿ 2,900,000,000

The first-ever crowned One Piece TCG game champion. Every matchup, every meta, every line of play — if it has happened on the board, Guanrong did it first.

Mackenyu AMBASSADOR
Taz AMBASSADOR
Global Brand Ambassadors

The Duo

Mackenyu & Taz

Two faces who bring the Straw Hats to life on screen — and passionate One Piece TCG collectors in their own right. As Global Brand Ambassadors, they carry the OPCARDX flag to collectors around the world, from convention floors to the open seas.

⚓
First Bounty · Now Charting

The Port Opens
With Signed Treasure

Our maiden voyage is The Port — a marketplace for authenticated, signed One Piece cards. Every signature traced, sealed, and logged like a captain's papers, so you always know exactly what treasure you hold.

The first bounties on the board: signed Zoro and Sanji cards — a fitting maiden haul for a crew that knows these Straw Hats better than anyone.

  • ✦Verified authentic. Every signature checked and sealed by the OP CardX Authentication Guild.
  • ✦Full provenance. Where it was signed, by whom, and every owner since — the complete log.
  • ✦Insured passage. Bonded vault storage and insured shipping on every bounty claimed.
